# Portfolio — k1en

> Personal portfolio site of k1en (Astro 5 + React islands). Showcases featured projects, tech stack, and contact links. Migrated from CRA + Chakra UI to Astro for static-site performance.

## Routes

- [Home](https://k1en.me/): Hero, tech carousel, connect, featured projects, footer
- [Projects](https://k1en.me/projects): Full project grid

## Source

- [README](https://github.com/k1enn/portfolio/blob/main/README.md): Stack, scripts, structure, deploy notes
- [projects.json](https://github.com/k1enn/portfolio/blob/main/src/data/projects.json): Project list (title, description, image, link, tags)
- [technologies.json](https://github.com/k1enn/portfolio/blob/main/src/data/technologies.json): Tech stack carousel data

## Stack

- Astro 5 (SSG)
- React 18 islands (`client:load`) for interactive components
- Framer Motion animations
- React Icons
- Plain CSS + design tokens via CSS variables

## Optional

- [Astro Config](https://github.com/k1enn/portfolio/blob/main/astro.config.mjs): Build config
- [Deploy](https://k1en.site): GitHub Pages mirror via `public/CNAME`
